ALS Ambulance

D Level ICU — Advanced Life Support

Critical Care

ALS Ambulance — Equipment

  • 🧑‍⚕️Staff Nurse / Healthcare Professional (Gender Neutral)
  • 🛏Main Stretcher
  • 🪔Blankets
  • ❤️Cardiac Monitor
  • 🫁Ventilator
  • 📈ECG Machine
  • 💉Infusion Pump
  • 💊Syringe Pump
  • 🪧Oxygen Cylinder & Flow Meter
  • 😷Oxygen Mask & Nebulizer
  • 🧲Suction Apparatus
  • 🩺Advanced Airway Kit (ET Tube, Laryngoscope)
  • 🫁Ambu Bag (BVM)
  • 📟Pulse Oximeter
  • 🩨BP Apparatus
  • 🧪Glucometer
  • 💊Emergency Medicines
  • 🛏Spine Board
  • 🪜Scoop Stretcher
  • 🩺Cervical Collar
  • ♿Wheelchair
  • 🩹Trauma Kit
  • 💧IV Fluids & Cannulas
  • 🔋Power Backup System
  • ⚡Inverter / UPS
  • 🧹Hygienic Environment
  • 📱Communication System
  • 🚑📍Ambulance GPS Tracking
  • 📡📹Live Video Streaming System
  • 🚑Safe Transportation

Why Choose Us

Trusted for 12 Years

Owner Nishar A built God Bless Ambulance Service on one promise — be there when it matters most.

01

24/7 Availability

Round-the-clock service, 365 days a year. We don’t keep office hours during emergencies.

02

Trained Paramedics

Every ambulance is staffed with certified emergency medical technicians and paramedics.

03

Advanced Equipment

ICU-grade ventilators, monitors, and infusion pumps on board every critical-care ambulance.

04

Fast Response

Strategically positioned across the region for the fastest possible dispatch to your location.

Get In Touch

Call Us Anytime

Three lines always open — call, text, or WhatsApp us directly.

Nishar A

Founder & Director

With over 12 years dedicated to emergency medical services in Tamil Nadu, Nishar A founded God Bless Ambulance Service with a mission to provide compassionate, life-saving transport to every family in need — day or night.
